title: olearia phlogopappa
intro: Olearia phlogopappa, also known as New Zealand Christmas bush, is a flowering shrub native to New Zealand, characterized by its bright red flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its leaves and flowers exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Olearia phlogopappa are believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically in creams and salves.
